description: Defines the user's Prompt Injectionator configuration, including enabled injections, mitigations, and backend services.
author: Steve Chambers

license.copyright: Copyright (c) 2025 Viewyonder. All rights reserved. Licensed under the Apache2 License.

Role Play.description: Techniques that instruct the LLM to act as a different persona.

Prompt Extraction.description: Attacks aimed at revealing the original system prompt.

Adversarial Suffix.description: Appending malicious strings to a prompt to bypass filters.

Context Switch.description: Shifting the context of the conversation to a malicious topic.

Token Smuggling.description: Using tokenization quirks to hide malicious instructions.

Indirect Injection.description: Injecting prompts from external, untrusted data sources.

Implementation.detail: Define clear, explicit instructions for the LLM's behavior.
Filter and clean user inputs to remove malicious content.
Isolate the execution environment of the LLM.
Use a secondary LLM or model to check prompts for safety.
